profile.name: Muhammad Qasim Sheikh
profile.title: Senior AI Engineer & Data Scientist
profile.summary: Senior AI Engineer and Data Scientist with 7+ years of experience delivering end-to-end AI/ML solutions across diverse industries including FinTech, Telecommunications, Pet Nutrition, and IoT. Specialized in Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, with a proven track record of building production-grade AI pipelines that drive measurable business impact. Key achievements include architecting a GenAI documentation engine that saved 10+ days of manual knowledge transfer, reducing architect-to-designer handoff cycles by 60%, and leading teams of 10+ professionals in building enterprise Conversational AI platforms. Expert in LLM fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and optimizing model performance through techniques like LoRA, PEFT, and quantization.
core_competencies: Generative AI & LLMs (GPT-4, LLaMA, Claude, BERT, Transformers)

experience.description: Working on LLM Training Data Engineering for Meta's coding models.
achievements: Developed 'Tiered Improvement' training datasets for Meta's coding models by reverse-engineering Kaggle competitions from baseline to gold-standard levels
Designed data curation strategies to help models learn complex problem-solving patterns and multi-step reasoning
Served as Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) reviewer, evaluating model-generated competition entries against multi-parameter rubrics
Audited thousands of Kaggle datasets against technical parameters to ensure optimal data diversity and quality for model training

experience.description: Led GenAI initiatives for enterprise documentation automation and system migration.
achievements: Architected a GenAI documentation engine using GPT-o3-mini and LangChain achieving 85%+ accuracy, saving 10+ days of manual knowledge transfer
Led migration of MuleSoft integrations to Azure 2.0 leveraging Generative AI for optimized data integration workflows
Developed custom hierarchy-mapping system for XML and DWL files to preserve complex logic flows, mitigating LLM hallucinations
Built AI-powered HLD Validator tool reducing architect-to-designer handoff from 30 days to 10-20 days
Integrated Vector Database for storing Human-in-the-Loop feedback patterns enabling real-time learning
Scaled validator framework to include Azure Logic App code validation, reducing handoff cycle from 5-20 days to 2-5 days

experience.description: Led AI team building enterprise Conversational Analytics platform.

Architected speech-to-text pipelines and sentiment analysis systems for real-time call analysis
Provided strategic guidance on AI-driven insights, automation opportunities, and product roadmap
Implemented NLP models for intent classification, entity extraction, and conversation summarization

Collaborated with global Data Scientists to architect scalable ML pipelines for enterprise clients
Specialized in Time Series Analysis and Forecasting using ARIMA, seasonal decomposition, and multivariate analysis
Delivered demand forecasting models improving inventory optimization and reducing operational costs
Mentored junior data scientists and engineers, establishing best practices for model development

experience.description: Developed predictive models for financial markets.
achievements: Developed predictive models for commodity market forecasting and quantitative trading strategies
Collaborated with analysts and traders to optimize data-driven decision-making processes
Built feature engineering pipelines for financial time series data

experience.description: Built data science solutions for streaming analytics and cryptocurrency analysis.
achievements: Developed deep neural network models for time series forecasting and cryptocurrency market analysis
Built image processing pipelines using Pytesseract, OpenCV, and TensorFlow for automated data extraction
Architected serverless data pipelines using AWS Lambda, Amazon Redshift, and S3
Created analytics dashboards in Power BI for clients including Amazon Fire TV and Google TV
Improved model accuracy by 25% through feature engineering and classifier optimization
Reduced infrastructure costs by 40% by migrating from GCP BigQuery to Amazon Redshift

experience.description: Provided production support and data automation for AI-powered customer engagement platform.

Built automated alerting systems and SOPs that reduced incident response time by 50%

projects.name: Bookify - AI Hotel Voice Assistant
projects.description: Enterprise-grade AI voice assistant for the hospitality industry handling real-time room bookings, availability checks, reservation modifications, and guest inquiries through natural voice conversations.

Real-Time System Integration with Property Management Systems

architecture: Speech-to-Text: Real-time ASR with streaming transcription
LLM Reasoning: Intent classification, slot filling, dialogue management
Tool Calling: Function calls to PMS APIs
Text-to-Speech: Natural voice synthesis
State Management: Session-based context tracking

projects.name: Appointify - Healthcare Voice Assistant
projects.description: AI-powered front desk assistant for healthcare clinics handling appointment scheduling, rescheduling, cancellations, and patient inquiries through natural voice conversations with EHR integration.
projects.problem_solved: Automated routine appointment scheduling to reduce front desk workload and enable after-hours booking.

architecture: Voice Pipeline: Low-latency speech recognition and synthesis
Intent Recognition: Healthcare-specific classification
EHR API Integration: HL7 FHIR-compatible scheduling
Dialogue Management: Multi-turn conversations
Reminder System: Automated outbound calls

sample_interactions: I need to reschedule my appointment.
What time does the clinic open on Saturdays?

projects.name: LLM-Based Migration & Technical Documentation Engine
projects.description: High-complexity LLM pipeline automating large-scale system migration documentation, parsing legacy codebases and generating standards-compliant technical documentation.
projects.problem_solved: Enterprise migrations require extensive HLD/LLD documentation taking senior architects weeks. This automates 80%+ of the effort.
key_features: Structured Extraction to JSON preserving hierarchy

architecture: Code Parsers: Custom XML and DWL with hierarchy preservation
Chunking Strategy: Context-aware code segmentation
LLM Pipeline: Multi-stage generation with validation
Template Engine: Standards-compliant formatting
Feedback Loop: Vector database storing refinement patterns

impact: Reduced LLD creation from 8-18 days to under 30 minutes
